title: LuhTech Venture Edge
description: Defines the draw relationship between a venture and a service node. Every time a venture consumes a resource from the shared pool — agent invocation, CoE time, infrastructure, tooling — an edge record is created or updated. The ledger inside each edge is the P&L allocation audit trail. equityImplication=true edges trigger equity instrument creation for SME contributors.

edgeId.description: Canonical URN. Unique per service-venture pair. Format: urn:luhtech:edge:<venture>-<service-slug>. Example: urn:luhtech:edge:ectropy-decision-router

serviceRef.description: URN reference to the service-node record this edge draws from.

ventureId.description: The venture consuming this service. luhtech-business = the holding company itself consuming services for portfolio operations.

drawType.description: How the venture draws from this service. invocation = discrete agent call (per-call pricing). time-allocation = CoE founder or SME time (hourly or fractional FTE). infra-share = proportional share of infrastructure cost. tooling-access = access to shared software tooling (flat or usage-based).

allocationBasis.description: How the cost/equity allocation is calculated for this edge. usf-weighted = allocation proportional to service USF score and draw volume. time-boxed = fixed time unit allocation (e.g. 0.2 FTE per quarter). flat-rate = fixed charge per period regardless of usage. proportional-usage = actual usage measured and billed.

allocationRate.description: The rate applied for allocation calculation. Fields depend on allocationBasis.

unitValue.description: Dollar amount or fraction per unit. For percentage-of-cost: 0.0–1.0.

fteFraction.description: For time-allocation drawType: fraction of full-time equivalent. 0.2 = 20% of one person's capacity.

ledger.description: Ordered draw records for this edge. The audit trail. Every consumption event appends a record. Never edited — append-only. This is the source of truth for P&L sharding and equity instrument valuation.

recordId.description: Unique record identifier within this ledger. Format: ISO date + sequence. Example: 2026-03-12-001.

units.description: Quantity drawn. Interpretation depends on drawType: invocations, hours, months, or fraction of resource.

usfAtDraw.description: USF score of the service node at the time of this draw. Snapshot — allows historical allocation recalculation even as scores change.

allocatedValue.description: Dollar value allocated to this venture for this draw record. Derived: units × allocationRate.unitValue × usfAtDraw.

period.description: Quarter this draw belongs to for rollup. Example: 2026-Q1.

notes.description: Optional context for this draw. Example: 'Canadian pilot prep — decision routing validation'.

periodSummary.description: Rolled-up quarterly summaries derived from ledger. Computed by the transform pipeline — do not edit manually.

equityValueAccrued.description: For equityImplication=true edges: equity value accrued in USD equivalent this period.

equityImplication.description: If true, draws on this edge accrue toward an equity instrument for the contributor (SME or CoE founder). Applicable only when serviceType=coe-time. When true, an equity-instrument record must exist referencing this edgeId.

equityInstrumentRef.description: Required when equityImplication=true. URN of the equity-instrument record that governs vesting for contributions on this edge.

chargeCode.description: P&L routing code for accounting. Format: <ventureId>-<costCenter>-<year>. Example: ectropy-platform-2026. Used by the holding company for financial reporting.

status.description: active = currently drawing from service. paused = temporarily suspended. closed = permanently ended, ledger frozen.
